name: fix-bug
tagline: Fixes a reported React Router bug end-to-end: fetch issue, reproduce, write a failing test, implement fix, open PR.
verdict: Concrete, well-ordered workflow scoped to the react-router repo with named commands, file maps, and explicit test-pass/fail checks. It handles missing reproductions but not gh/pnpm availability, has no stated exclusions, no idempotency check for branch/change-file creation, and no version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion guidance anywhere despite a fairly broad GitHub-issue trigger.
Branch and change-file creation (step 6) have no existing-name check; a re-run could collide silently.
gh and pnpm are used throughout with no upfront availability/auth check or install hint.
